hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams verify originator information completeness within Travel Rule workflows by connecting data, exceptions, cases, and audit evidence into one controlled process.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Incomplete or inconsistent originator information creates delays in Travel Rule message handling and exception management. Compliance teams struggle to verify and route transactions quickly without reliable data standards or unified workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects originator information, provider outputs and routing status into a unified workflow that supports completeness checks, flags exceptions and preserves audit evidence for Travel Rule compliance teams.
workflow_title: From originator data to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY verifies originator details for Travel Rule messages then routes exceptions into cases with documented evidence for compliance review and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another Travel Rule provider. The workflow evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns fragmented Travel Rule originator data into structured cases, decisions and audit evidence without replacing existing message routing or validation providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing originator data completeness with governed provider integration, audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment for scalable compliance and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY check originator data completeness workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how originator data integrates into Travel Rule cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports originator data review
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration for Travel Rule data routing
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule originator data?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures originator data into a connected workflow supporting VASP compliance with Travel Rule requirements, enabling consistent data completeness checks and case management across message processing.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY check originator data completeness?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal rules to validate originator data completeness, routing incomplete or high-risk messages into review cases with alerts and decision logs for compliance teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, message histories and evidence packages linked to originator data for audit-ready reviews and supervisory inspections without altering provider data.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects with multiple Travel Rule providers, aggregating their message statuses and originator outputs into one operational layer for centralized compliance workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but sits above them, turning their outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reports for better operational control.
final_description: See how SFTY connects originator checks, exception handling and audit evidence into one structured Travel Rule compliance process.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
